case_title: BATEMAN, JOHN L. vs. JENSEN, JOHN RODNEY IND/DBA ADVANCED DRYWALL SYS.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATEMAN, JOHN L. AS TO DEFENDANT JENSEN, JOHN RODNEY IND/DBA ADVANCED DRYWALL SYS.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATEMAN, JOHN L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENSEN, JOHN RODNEY IND/DBA ADVANCED DRYWALL SYS. $4,071.50 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,151.50
